eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Benton; Franklin; Walla Walla, WA; at 8:15 AM on JUN 11, 2026 Effective until 11:15 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is Benton County  Emergency Management conducting a required monthly test of the emergency alert system. If this were an actual emergency, this system would bring you important information. The following tones will conclude this test.
